description.en: OpenAI introduced DALL-E as a transformer-based system that generated images from text descriptions. It made text-to-image generation a public-facing demonstration of how language models could control visual synthesis.
description.zh: OpenAI 提出 DALL-E，这是一种基于 Transformer、从文本描述生成图像的系统。它让文生图成为面向公众展示语言模型如何控制视觉合成的重要案例。

subcaption.zh: DALL-E 主要作者与创建者

license.en: OpenAI image republished by BAAI Hub; reuse rights not stated.
license.zh: OpenAI 图片，经智源社区转载；未说明复用权利。

subcaption.en: Original local explainer of prompt-conditioned image generation.
subcaption.zh: 关于提示词条件图像生成的本地原创解释图。

license.en: Original local SVG redraw; source figures are not copied.
license.zh: 本地原创 SVG 重绘；未复制来源图形。

portraits.label: Aditya Ramesh portrait image search
portraits.usage: Find portrait candidates; open original file page and verify license.

portraits.label: Aditya Ramesh Wikimedia Commons image search
portraits.usage: Prefer files with clear Commons license metadata.

eventImages.label: DALL-E event photo search
eventImages.usage: Look for event photographs, group photos, venue images, or archive scans.

eventImages.label: DALL-E Wikimedia Commons search
eventImages.usage: Open-license image candidates; verify each file page before using.

eventImages.label: DALL-E Library of Congress image search
eventImages.usage: Historical image candidate search; verify rights statement.

publications.label: DALL-E publication search
publications.usage: Find paper, journal, proceedings, magazine, or archive records.

publications.label: DALL-E scholar search
publications.usage: Find scholarly publications and citation trail.

review.imagePolicy: Do not use new remote images in production until source and license are verified.
nextSteps: Open sources.json and pages/ to verify primary facts.
Record accepted/rejected image candidates in notes.md.
Move approved assets into resources/images only after review.
